detail:
WMI-3 Arbitrary Free: vgem_dmamove_ctx_free() traverses 'pending_descs' through a pointer that could be stale (type dmamove_job is freed elsewhere). Elements reached through this traversal are freed here. If the pointer was reclaimed, attacker controls what gets freed.
WMI-3 Arbitrary Free: vgem_dmamove_ctx_free() traverses 'src_buf' through a pointer that could be stale (type dmamove_job is freed elsewhere). Elements reached through this traversal are freed here. If the pointer was reclaimed, attacker controls what gets freed.
